rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious account creation
id: 271caa0f-29fc-4123-888d-bf241700d623
description: Suspicious accountname used for created account
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Axel Olsson
date: '2022-08-12'
logsource:
  product: azure
  service: activitylogs
tags:
- attack.persistence
detection:
  selection:
    Operation: Add user.
    ObjectId|startswith:
    - admin
    - Admin
    - backup
    - User
    - Test
    - ftpuser@
    - Support@
    - root@
    - Office@
    - remote@
    - office@
    - manager@
    - username@
    - login@
    - super@
    - domain@
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate accounts
level: high
